summary.what_built: This module adds a new API endpoint that returns a current portfolio snapshot in JSON format.
summary.problem: It provides a way to access the current portfolio data programmatically.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to potential issues with hardcoded data and future updates for dynamic data retrieval.
summary.validation: The code was checked for syntax errors and basic functionality.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new API endpoint will be added to the application.
summary.uncertainty: There is uncertainty about how the hardcoded data will be received by users and if dynamic data will be implemented later.
